message:
test: add 6 new test suites for security, conformance, and fs shim coverage

Introduce comprehensive test suites covering critical security boundaries
and extension infrastructure:

capability_denial_matrix.rs (bd-23do):
  Systematic regression suite proving capability policy enforcement across
  all connector methods for Strict/Prompt/Permissive policy modes. Verifies
  denied calls return deterministic error payloads with correct error codes,
  messages, and preserved correlation IDs.

ext_conformance_selector.rs (bd-2fps.1.1):
  Deterministic extension selector for the Rust-N/A pool. Uses SplitMix64
  PRNG for reproducible random subset selection from the validated manifest,
  with support for tier and source filters.

ext_random_trials.rs (bd-2fps.1.2):
  Random extension trials harness that selects deterministic subsets from
  the N/A pool and runs them through the conformance pipeline. Outputs
  JSONL logs and summary manifests. Configurable via environment variables
  for seed, sample size, and filters.

extensions_fs_shim.rs (bd-1av0.1):
  Unit tests for the node:fs virtual filesystem shim covering sync/async
  operations, host FS fallback, stat objects, promises namespace, and
  callback-based async functions.

security_fs_escape.rs (bd-740v):
  Filesystem escape hardening tests verifying extensions cannot break out
  of their allowed scope via path traversal, absolute paths, or other
  techniques. Covers VFS normalization, host read fallback, and tool-level
  path resolution.

security_http_policy.rs (bd-437s):
  HTTP connector policy enforcement covering host allowlist/denylist,
  TLS requirements, request body size limits, timeout enforcement,
  URL redaction in logs, unsupported schemes/methods, and denylist
  precedence over allowlist.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
